requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation and Grid Compatibility — AS/NZS 3000 and New Zealand 230/400 V 50 Hz Supply
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装与电网兼容——AS/NZS 3000及新西兰230/400 V、50 Hz供电
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝與電網相容——AS/NZS 3000及紐西蘭230/400 V、50 Hz供電

summary.en: New Zealand EV charging installations must be designed for the local 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz electricity supply and installed under the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010. Fixed wiring and dedicated EV charging circuits should be compatible with AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules, including circuit protection, earthing, RCD selection, isolation, cable sizing, and load management. Installation work must be performed by a New Zealand licensed electrical worker where prescribed electrical work is involved.
summary.zh: 新西兰电动汽车充电安装须按当地230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供电系统设计，并依据《2010年电气（安全）法规》实施。固定布线和电动汽车充电专用回路应与AS/NZS 3000布线规则兼容，包括回路保护、接地、RCD选择、隔离、电缆截面及负载管理。涉及规定电气工作的安装须由新西兰持证电气工作人员完成。
summary.zht: 紐西蘭電動汽車充電安裝須按當地230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供電系統設計，並依據《2010年電氣（安全）法規》實施。固定布線和電動汽車充電專用迴路應與AS/NZS 3000布線規則相容，包括迴路保護、接地、RCD選擇、隔離、電纜截面及負載管理。涉及規定電氣工作的安裝須由紐西蘭持證電氣工作人員完成。

standards_or_laws: New Zealand nominal low-voltage supply: 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: China-market EV charging installations commonly reference GB 50966, GB/T 51313, and China 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply assumptions. These documents do not establish compliance with New Zealand electrical installation law, AS/NZS 3000 wiring practices, or local licensed-worker requirements.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电安装通常参考GB 50966、GB/T 51313，以及中国220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电假设。这些文件不能证明符合新西兰电气安装法律、AS/NZS 3000布线实践或当地持证人员要求。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電安裝通常參考GB 50966、GB/T 51313，以及中國220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電假設。這些文件不能證明符合紐西蘭電氣安裝法律、AS/NZS 3000布線實務或當地持證人員要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure
China nominal low-voltage supply: 220/380 V, 50 Hz

gap.en: Installation gap: the final New Zealand product variant and manual must state ratings and installation instructions for 230/400 V, 50 Hz and AS/NZS 3000-compatible protection and earthing. China 220/380 V assumptions, GB installation drawings, and domestic installer instructions should be replaced with New Zealand-specific documentation reviewed by a licensed electrician or electrical engineer.
gap.zh: 安装差距：最终新西兰产品型号及手册须注明适用于230/400 V、50 Hz以及与AS/NZS 3000兼容的保护和接地要求。中国220/380 V假设、GB安装图纸及国内安装说明应替换为经持证电工或电气工程师审查的新西兰专用文件。
gap.zht: 安裝差距：最終紐西蘭產品型號及手冊須註明適用於230/400 V、50 Hz以及與AS/NZS 3000相容的保護和接地要求。中國220/380 V假設、GB安裝圖紙及國內安裝說明應替換為經持證電工或電氣工程師審查的紐西蘭專用文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — New Zealand electrical installation work must comply with the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010 and applicable AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules; prescribed electrical work requires licensed electrical workers
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic installations — China GB installation standards apply domestically but are not New Zealand installation evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] New Zealand EV charger installations must be treated as New Zealand electrical work, not as a copy of a China GB installation. Confirm 230/400 V 50 Hz ratings, AS/NZS 3000-compatible circuit protection and earthing, and licensed New Zealand installation before supply or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰电动汽车充电安装应作为新西兰电气工作处理，不能照搬中国GB安装。供货或投运前应确认230/400 V、50 Hz额定值、与AS/NZS 3000兼容的回路保护和接地，以及由新西兰持证人员安装。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 紐西蘭電動汽車充電安裝應作為紐西蘭電氣工作處理，不能照搬中國GB安裝。供貨或投運前應確認230/400 V、50 Hz額定值、與AS/NZS 3000相容的迴路保護和接地，以及由紐西蘭持證人員安裝。
